# opnsense_interface_lagg (Data Source)

Reads a LAGG interface on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `device` (String) Assigned LAGG device name (auto-assigned by OPNsense).
- `lacp_fast_timeout` (Boolean) Use LACP fast timeout.
- `lacp_strict` (String) LACP strict mode: empty for default, 1 for yes, 0 for no.
- `lagg_hash` (Set of String) Hash layers for protocols that support hash selection: l2, l3, and/or l4.
- `members` (Set of String) Member interfaces in the LAGG. Use free, non-management physical interfaces from the test appliance.
- `mtu` (Number) MTU for the LAGG interface (576-65535).
- `primary_member` (String) Primary member interface; must be one of the member interfaces when set.
- `protocol` (String) LAGG protocol: none, lacp, failover, fec, loadbalance, or roundrobin.
- `use_flowid` (String) Use flow ID: empty for default, 1 for yes, 0 for no.
